portfolio.heading: Explore Our Technology Stack
portfolio.subtext: ORION operates across two focused verticals — Business Systems Implementation powered by Zoho, and the ORION Publishing Intelligence Platform. Together they form a fully connected, insight-driven foundation for modern publishing businesses.

cards.title: Zoho
cards.subtitle: Business Systems Implementation
cards.description: Empowering businesses with CRM setup, sales and workflow automation, inventory structuring, and custom reporting dashboards — configured precisely for publishing and distribution operations.

cards.title: ORION Platform
cards.subtitle: Publishing Intelligence Layer
cards.description: A unified platform built for publishers — combining manuscript validation (SUBMIT+), AI-assisted editorial intelligence (EDITOR+), and real-time business dashboards (PUBLISH+) into one connected system.

slides.title: ORION Bits Systems Pvt. Ltd.
slides.subtitle: AI-Powered Accessibility & Publishing Automation
slides.description: PDF/UA ,WCAG remediation, editorial intelligence, and publishing workflow automation.

slides.title: Zoho Business Systems
slides.subtitle: Structured Digital Operations for Growing Businesses
slides.description: We implement and customize Zoho CRM, automation, and reporting tools — giving your team organized workflows and a strong foundation for scalable growth.

slides.title: Publishing Intelligence Platform
slides.subtitle: From Submission to Sale — One Connected System
slides.description: ORION SUBMIT+, EDITOR+, and PUBLISH+ work together to validate manuscripts, improve editorial quality, and deliver real-time business visibility.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: ORION Bits Systems digital intelligence platform interface showing publishing industry automation analytics
heading: Intelligent Digital Systems
for the Publishing Industry
infoBlocks.body: ORION Bits Systems is a technology company focused on building intelligent digital systems for the publishing industry. We help publishers move from fragmented operations and manual workflows to structured systems, real-time visibility, and better decision-making—without disrupting their existing tools. As an intelligence layer on top of your current ecosystem, we deliver clarity, consistency, and control through precision—not complexity.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: ORION's foundation is built upon intelligence and precision, guiding us to provide results-driven publishing systems that propel our clients towards structured, scalable growth.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: Zoho CRM dashboard with automated sales and inventory workflows for growing digital publishing teams
heading: Zoho-Powered Business Systems
for Growing Organizations
infoBlocks.body: We help businesses implement structured digital systems using Zoho to streamline operations and improve efficiency. From CRM setup and sales automation to inventory management and custom reporting dashboards — ORION configures and connects your tools so your team spends less time on manual work and more time on what matters. Built for publishers, distributors, and content-driven businesses across India.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: Our Business Systems Implementation builds the operational foundation, while the ORION Platform adds the intelligence layer on top — giving your publishing business complete visibility, from submission to sale.

slides.title: Real Problems. Real Systems. Real Impact.
slides.subtitle: Intelligent Solutions Across Industries
slides.description: Explore how Orion designs and delivers intelligent systems that solve complex business challenges across industries.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: AI systems integration diagram showing custom database connections and agentic workflow architecture
heading: Deep Problem Understanding,
Intelligent System Design
infoBlocks.body: Many businesses struggle with complex operational challenges that off-the-shelf tools can't solve. Processes are fragmented, decisions are slow, and visibility is limited. ORION engineers purpose-built systems that address these challenges head-on — combining AI, automation, and intelligent design to deliver measurable outcomes.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: We don't apply generic tools to unique problems. Every system we build starts with a deep understanding of the challenge — and ends with outcomes that are measurable, scalable, and real.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: Data analytics dashboard showing measurable operational efficiency gains and manual error reduction
heading: Measurable Outcomes Across
Every Industry We Serve
infoBlocks.body: From publishing to manufacturing, content engineering to enterprise AI — ORION has delivered intelligent systems that reduce inefficiencies, improve decision quality, and create scalable operational foundations. Each engagement is tailored to the specific context, constraints, and goals of the business.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: Our case studies reflect a consistent approach: understand deeply, design intelligently, and deliver systems that create lasting operational impact.

content.heading: Real Problems. Real Systems. Real Impact.
content.subtext: Explore how Orion designs and delivers intelligent systems that solve complex business challenges across industries.

studies.title: AI-Powered Manuscript Evaluation
studies.description: Built an AI system to automate manuscript screening based on structure, readability, and content quality.

studies.title: Intelligent Quality Control System
studies.description: Developed ML-based defect detection using production parameters like temperature, pressure, and machine speed.

studies.title: AI-Assisted Copy Editing Engine
studies.description: Built a hybrid system combining rule-based editing with LLM-based validation and fact-checking.

studies.title: Agentic RAG Knowledge System
studies.description: Designed a retrieval-augmented system with intelligent agents for contextual knowledge access.

studies.title: Manufacturing Workflow Automation
studies.description: Built a digital checklist system with approval loops, rejection workflows, and tracking.

content.ctaText: Every business has unique challenges. We specialize in transforming those challenges into scalable, intelligent systems.

slides.title: AI & Intelligent Systems Development
slides.subtitle: From LLM Platforms to Agentic Workflows
slides.description: We design and build enterprise-grade AI systems that automate complex workflows using LLMs, RAG, and multi-agent architectures.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: Abstract representation of artificial intelligence neural networks representing traditional software limitations vs intelligent systems
heading: The Challenge with
Traditional Software
infoBlocks.body: Traditional applications are not built for complex, knowledge-driven workflows. As businesses scale, fragmented systems and manual processes limit efficiency and decision-making.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: Modern businesses need systems that understand context, automate decisions, and continuously improve with data and feedback.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: AI native system design blueprint featuring multi agent workflows and LLM orchestration
heading: AI-Native System Design
Built for Real Workflows
infoBlocks.body: At ORION, we build AI systems with intelligence at the core—not as an add-on. From multi-agent workflows to RAG pipelines, we create systems that think, adapt, and execute.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: We combine structured system design with advanced AI capabilities to deliver production-grade platforms, not prototypes.

content.whyText: We bridge cutting-edge AI with real-world deployment. Our systems are production-grade, scalable, and built for measurable business impact.
content.ctaHeading: Have an AI Use Case to Solve?

slides.title: CRM Systems That Actually Work for Your Business
slides.subtitle: Structured Systems. Real Adoption. Measurable Results.
slides.description: Move beyond spreadsheets and disconnected tools. Build a structured CRM system with full visibility into your sales and operations.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: Illustration of CRM implementation pipeline mapping sales pipeline tracking and automated workflow steps
heading: Why Most CRM
Implementations Fail
infoBlocks.body: Many businesses invest in CRM tools but fail to see results. Data is incomplete, teams don't adopt the system, and workflows remain manual. The issue isn't the tool— it's the lack of structured implementation aligned with real business processes.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: Without clear workflows and adoption strategy, even the best CRM tools fail to deliver value. Structure is what turns tools into systems.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: Modern CRM customer dashboard illustrating centralized data integration and sales performance tracking
heading: A Structured Approach
to CRM Implementation
infoBlocks.body: At ORION, we don't just configure CRM—we design complete business systems. We map your sales processes, define workflows, and implement automation aligned with how your team actually works.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: Our approach ensures your CRM is actually used by your team—leading to better data, clearer insights, and measurable business outcomes.

content.whyText: We focus on structured implementation—not just tool setup. Our systems are designed for real adoption, ensuring your team actually uses the CRM and gets measurable value.
content.ctaHeading: Ready to Build a CRM That Works?

slides.title: AI-Powered Systems for Modern Publishing Workflows
slides.subtitle: From Submission to Insights — One Connected System
slides.description: Transform fragmented publishing operations into structured, intelligent workflows with real-time visibility and control.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: Publishing workflow system diagram showcasing structured pipelines from manuscript submission to production
heading: Structured Publishing Workflows
for Modern Content Operations
infoBlocks.body: Publishing workflows are often fragmented across emails, spreadsheets, and disconnected tools. This leads to poor visibility, delays, and inconsistent editorial processes. ORION transforms these fragmented operations into structured, system-driven workflows—giving teams clarity, control, and real-time visibility across the entire publishing lifecycle.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: We replace manual, disconnected workflows with structured pipelines that improve consistency, reduce delays, and create a scalable operational foundation for publishing teams.

infoBlocks.imageAlt: ORION publishing intelligence platform dashboard tracking manuscript validation and editorial metrics
heading: End-to-End Publishing Intelligence
with ORION Platform
infoBlocks.body: ORION SUBMIT+, EDITOR+, and PUBLISH+ work together to manage the entire publishing lifecycle— from manuscript submission and validation to editorial workflows and final business insights. The platform acts as an intelligence layer on top of your existing tools, ensuring better decisions, faster turnaround, and complete operational visibility.
infoBlocks.philosophyText: From submission to distribution, ORION connects every stage of publishing into one unified system—enabling data-driven decisions and complete control over operations.

content.heading: Intelligent Publishing Systems
content.subtext: Transform fragmented workflows into structured, intelligent systems with real-time visibility, editorial control, and scalable operations.

problem.label: THE PROBLEM
problem.text: Publishing workflows are fragmented across emails, spreadsheets, and tools. This leads to poor visibility, delays, and inconsistent editorial processes.

solution.label: THE SOLUTION
solution.text: ORION transforms publishing into a system-driven workflow with AI-assisted processes, delivering clarity, consistency, and control.
